## beehiiv bulk-subscriptions create

Create subscriptions in bulk

### Synopsis

Bulk create subscription

Create new subscriptions for a publication.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/bulk_subscriptions

```
beehiiv bulk-subscriptions create [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv bulk-subscriptions create --body @bulk-subscriptions.json
beehiiv bulk-imports import --body @bulk-subscriptions.json
```

### Options

```
      --body string         Provide a request body as inline JSON, @path, or - for stdin
  -h, --help                help for create
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
